### RECENT DECISIONS

Cycle 12: Anticipating the muhayyar one cycle ahead — a held testimonial phrase enters at upper-center with a slow typewriter reveal, the breath that the climax will release.
  - addText({"content":"the breath stayed","position":"upper-center","style":"serif, large, light weight, warm parchment","reactivity":[{"property":"opacity","feature":"hijaz_intensity","map":{"in":[0,1],"out":[0)

Cycle 13: The second tahwil arrives — the room widens into a full-bleed moonlight on still water, a sustained warm horizon blooming on the muhayyar impulse, and a single testimonial phrase: "what the room held."
  - setBackground({"css_background":"radial-gradient(ellipse at 50% 60%, rgba(212,165,116,0.42), rgba(42,31,20,0.97) 75%)"})
  - addCompositeScene({"group_label":"muhayyar arrival — moonlight bloom and held breath","elements":[{"type":"image","query":"moonlight on still water at night, long reflection","position":"full bleed","layer":"background)

Cycle 14: Held breath releasing at the muhayyar — a single soft pale-candlelight pulse and a gentle widening of the moonlight band, no rupture.
  - pulseScene({"color":"rgba(245,230,200,0.55)","intensity":0.25,"duration_ms":1800})
  - addSVG({"svg_markup":"<svg viewBox=\"0 0 1000 300\" xmlns=\"http://www.w3.org/2000/svg\"><defs><linearGradient id=\"ml\" x1=\"0\" x2=\"1\" y1=\"0\" y2=\"0\"><stop offset=\"0\" stop-color=\"#f5e6c8\" stop-opa)

### FUTURE PREVIEW

Cycle 17 (t=90s): Intense, falling. Balanced timbre. Dense articulation. Tonal center G with secondary emphasis on A. Mid-performance.
Cycle 18 (t=95s): Tahwil: tonal gravity has shifted to the ghammaz. Quiet, sustained. Dark timbre. Very sparse articulation with space. Tonal center G with secondary emphasis on A. Mid-performance.
Cycle 19 (t=100s): Sustained on ghammaz; upper jins active. Quiet, falling. Balanced timbre. Sparse articulation with space. Tonal center F# with secondary emphasis on G. Mid-performance.

### COMPOSITION INTENT FOR THIS CYCLE

Active act: Climax — muhayyar arrival, fullest weight (Re-ascent into peak intensity. Second tahwil at 13 brings the muhayyar — full-stage moonlight band, warm parchment wash, composite scene with image dominant. Elevation, not impact. Begin cooling palette at 16.)
Cycle intent: Beginning to settle. Morph the warm bloom toward cooler slate. Fade older text. Palette begins cooling.
Energy hint: falling

### TASK

Emit tool calls per `tools.json` (in the system prefix). Honor the
audited Bayati visual vocabulary. Do not output anything other than
the rationale text block followed by tool calls.
